title: Influencer Collection & Export
description: Submit batch influencer collection jobs, then check status, fetch records, or export the completed task to xlsx/csv/html. Pricing: $0.05/task, $0.03/export, $2/1k fetched records.

operation.title: What do you want to do?
operation.description: Choose the workflow. Failed requests and status polling are not charged.
enumTitles: Check an existing task status - free
Fetch records from an existing task - $2/1k records

platform.title: Platform for new collection tasks
platform.description: Platform used when starting a new collection task. Twitter/X supports only profile URLs and usernames.
platform.sectionDescription: Use these fields when you choose one of the two start options above. Starting a task returns a task ID that you can later use for status, fetch, or export.

taskType.title: What will you provide?
taskType.description: Choose what the Values list contains. Twitter/X supports only profile URLs and usernames, not video collection.
enumTitles: Creator profile URLs -> collect creator profiles
Creator profile URLs -> collect videos from those creators

values.title: Values for URL/username/video collection
values.description: Used by URL/username/video collection. Add profile URLs for profile collection, usernames for username collection, profile URLs for creator-video collection, or post/video URLs for post-video collection.

keywords.title: Keywords for keyword collection
keywords.description: Used only by keyword collection. Add up to 10 keywords or hashtags to discover and collect matching creators.

taskName.title: New task name
taskName.description: Optional name shown in collection task records.

webhookUrl.title: Completion webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Optional HTTPS callback URL called when the collection task completes.

startTime.title: Video/keyword collection start time
startTime.description: Optional Unix timestamp in seconds. Mainly used by creator-video and keyword collection. Leave empty to use the backend default.

endTime.title: Video/keyword collection end time
endTime.description: Optional Unix timestamp in seconds. Defaults to current time when omitted.

waitForCompletion.title: Wait for task completion
waitForCompletion.description: Poll task status before finishing. Status polling itself is free.
waitForCompletion.sectionDescription: Optional polling after starting a new task. Polling is free, but the run will use Apify compute time while it waits.

maxPollAttempts.title: Max poll attempts
maxPollAttempts.description: Maximum polling attempts before timing out.

taskId.title: Existing collection task ID
taskId.description: Required for checking status, fetching records, or exporting a completed collection task.
taskId.sectionDescription: Use these fields after you already have a task ID from a previous collection run.

fetchData.title: After waiting, also fetch records
fetchData.description: Only used when starting a task with Wait for task completion enabled. For the standalone Fetch records operation, records are fetched automatically. Returned records are charged at $2 per 1,000 records.

exportFormat.title: Export file format
exportFormat.description: Used by Export an existing task. Also used after submitting a task when Wait for task completion is enabled. Leave as Do not export to avoid automatic export after submit. Standalone export defaults to xlsx if omitted.

maxResults.title: Max records to fetch
maxResults.description: Maximum records to fetch and charge for when using Fetch task data.
maxResults.sectionDescription: These options apply when fetching records or exporting an existing completed task.

size.title: Page size
size.description: Page size for fetching task records.

maxRetries.title: Max retries
maxRetries.description: Retries for temporary CreatiVault API rate-limit and server errors.
maxRetries.sectionDescription: Controls retries for temporary CreatiVault API errors. This is separate from Apify platform run options such as memory and timeout.
